message:
feat: Add hash-based prebuilt library caching

Implements auto-detection of prebuilt WAMR/Binaryen libraries to speed up
builds. The build system now:
- Hashes source directories (vendor/wamr/core, wamr-compiler, binaryen/src)
- Uses prebuilt .a/.dylib files if hash matches stored hash
- Rebuilds and saves new hash if sources changed
- No extra commands needed - `zig build` handles everything

This reduces CI build time from ~18 minutes to <2 minutes when sources
haven't changed.

Changes:
- Add build_cache.zig with SHA256-based directory hashing
- Modify build.zig to auto-detect prebuilt libraries
- Commit prebuilt darwin-arm64 libraries (~45MB total)
- Update .gitignore to allow vendor/prebuilt/

The prebuilt libraries include:
- wamr/libiwasm.a (822KB)
- wamr/libaotclib.a (813KB)
- wamr/libvmlib.a (912KB)
- binaryen/libbinaryen.dylib (33MB)

files.patch:
@@ -66,6 +66,9 @@ Thumbs.db
 
 # Vendor submodule build artifacts (never commit upstream changes)
 vendor/*
+# Exception: commit prebuilt libraries for faster CI builds
+!vendor/prebuilt/
+!vendor/prebuilt/**
 
 # Test files should be in test/ directory
 /test_*.js.env
